name: Akihabara
description: Akihabara is known for anime, manga, gaming, arcades, electronics shops, and themed cafes.

name: Tsukiji Outer Market
description: Tsukiji Outer Market has seafood stalls, street food, kitchenware shops, and lively market scenes for food photography.

name: Senso-ji Temple
description: Senso-ji Temple in Asakusa is a historic temple area with traditional shopping streets and strong photography opportunities.

name: Shibuya Sky
description: Shibuya Sky and nearby Shibuya Crossing offer skyline views, city lights, and iconic urban photography spots.

name: Ueno Park and Tokyo National Museum
description: Ueno combines a large park, museums, gardens, and cultural attractions including Tokyo National Museum.

name: Gardens by the Bay
description: Gardens by the Bay offers Supertrees, waterfront walks, conservatories, and dramatic photography locations.

name: National Gallery Singapore
description: National Gallery Singapore is an indoor museum focused on Southeast Asian art inside restored civic buildings.

name: Lau Pa Sat
description: Lau Pa Sat is a famous hawker centre for affordable local food and satay in a historic market building.

name: Singapore Botanic Gardens
description: Singapore Botanic Gardens is a UNESCO-listed green space suited to relaxed walks, orchids, nature, and photos.

name: Asian Civilisations Museum
description: Asian Civilisations Museum is an indoor museum exploring Asian cultures, trade, religion, and regional history.

name: Louvre Museum
description: The Louvre Museum is a major indoor art and history museum with the Mona Lisa, classical sculpture, and palace architecture.

name: Montmartre
description: Montmartre has hilltop views, cafes, artists, Sacre-Coeur, winding streets, culture, food, and photography spots.

name: Eiffel Tower and Trocadero
description: Trocadero and the Eiffel Tower are classic Paris viewpoints for architecture, skyline photos, and evening views.

name: Latin Quarter
description: The Latin Quarter is known for historic streets, bookshops, student life, casual restaurants, and cultural walks.

name: Luxembourg Gardens
description: Luxembourg Gardens is a relaxed park with fountains, tree-lined paths, sculptures, and classic Paris photo scenes.

name: Metropolitan Museum of Art
description: The Metropolitan Museum of Art is a large indoor museum with global art, ancient history, fashion, and architecture collections.

name: Central Park
description: Central Park offers lakes, walking paths, skyline views, lawns, bridges, and classic photography spots.

name: Times Square and Broadway
description: Times Square and Broadway are known for bright lights, theater, nightlife, crowds, and urban photography.

name: Chelsea Market
description: Chelsea Market is an indoor food hall and shopping destination near the High Line with casual food options.

name: Brooklyn Bridge and DUMBO
description: Brooklyn Bridge and DUMBO provide skyline views, waterfront walks, bridge architecture, and famous photo locations.
